description_long: This house features a modern architectural design with clean, angular lines and a multi-level structure. The exterior is predominantly white with sections of gray and brown, and it is set on a sloped lot with integrated landscaping, including green lawn areas and retaining walls. The building is composed of two main volumes: a taller, boxy section with large windows and a lower, wider section with a dark gable roof. The house includes a driveway or ramp leading to a garage or covered entry, and the windows are arranged asymmetrically, providing a contemporary aesthetic. The main entryway is recessed and partially sheltered, with steps leading up to the door. The overall appearance is sleek and minimalist, emphasizing geometric forms and functional outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, multi-level house with white and gray exterior, angular lines, and a mix of flat and gable roofs, set on a landscaped sloped lot.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, garage/ramp, and the taller section with large windows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the sloped terrain, the transition between the two main building volumes, and the garage entry.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the wide gable-roofed section and the backyard lawn area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the lower section, retaining walls, and the relationship between the two building volumes.
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main entry with steps, partially sheltered, minimalistic door, and integrated garage access
